statement.en: A FFT-based variational procedure for homogenization of maxwellian viscoelastic composites

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Paper title indicates a novel computational methodology (FFT-based variational homogenization) applied to Maxwell viscoelastic composite materials. Publication date is future-dated (2026-04-25), suggesting preprint or provisional status. The core claim—that FFT accelerates variational homogenization for this material class—is theoretically sound but requires empirical validation and peer review. No refutation evident; no establishment as canonical fact.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 振動する物質の中で、最良の滑らかさは周波数の記憶の中に隠れている。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 規則正しい波が重層する粗視化の核心で、細かさが消えて剛性が浮かぶ。
